# Gather resources for crafting
for _ in range(3):
    gather("Hero")  # ash_wood
for _ in range(5):
    gather("Hero")  # birch_wood
for _ in range(3):
    gather("Hero")  # iron_ore
for _ in range(5):
    gather("Hero")  # coal

# Fight for resources
move("Hero", -3, 0)
fight("Hero")  # Wolf
move("Hero", 0, -2)
fight("Hero")  # Blue Slime
move("Hero", 5, 4)
fight("Hero")  # Flying Serpent
move("Hero", -5, -5)
fight("Hero")  # Ogre
move("Hero", -3, -3)
fight("Hero")  # Pig
move("Hero", 8, 6)
fight("Hero")  # Skeleton

# Craft items
move("Hero", -2, -3)
craft("Hero", "hardwood_plank", 1)
move("Hero", 1, 5)
craft("Hero", "steel", 1)
move("Hero", 3, 1)
craft("Hero", "battlestaff", 1)
craft("Hero", "steel_armor", 1)
craft("Hero", "steel_shield", 1)

# Equip gear
equip("Hero", "weapon", "battlestaff")
equip("Hero", "body_armor", "steel_armor")
equip("Hero", "shield", "steel_shield")

# Fight Bandit Lizard
move("Hero", 0, 6)
fight("Hero")

# Gather resources for Strangold
gather("Hero")
move("Hero", 1, 7)  # Gold Ore
gather("Hero")
move("Hero", -1, 13)  # Cultist Acolyte for Magic Stone
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 10, 1)  # Owlbear for Owlbear Hair
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 1, 6)  # Coal Rocks (for mining XP)
gather("Hero")
move("Hero", 1, 7)  # Gold Ore again
gather("Hero")
move("Hero", -1, 7)  # Dead Wood
gather("Hero")
move("Hero", -3, 7)  # Magic Rocks for Magical Cure
gather("Hero")
move("Hero", 10, 2)  # Owlbear again
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", -1, 0)  # Ash Tree for Woodcutting XP
gather("Hero")
move("Hero", 3, 5)  # Birch Tree for Woodcutting XP
gather("Hero")
move("Hero", 1, 13)  # Demon for Demon Horn
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 0, 13)  # Imp for Demon Horn
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 4, 8)  # Bandit Lizard for Lizard Skin
fight("Hero")
move("Hero", 2, 0)  # Copper Rocks for Topaz
gather("Hero")
move("Hero", -2, -3)  # Woodcutting Station
craft("Hero", "dead_wood_plank", 1)
move("Hero", -3, 7)  # Magic Rocks again
gather("Hero")
move("Hero", -2, -3)  # Woodcutting Station
craft("Hero", "magical_plank", 1)
move("Hero", 1, 5)  # Mining Station
craft("Hero", "gold", 1)
craft("Hero", "strangold", 1)
move("Hero", 1, 3)  # Jewelrycrafting Station
craft("Hero", "topaz_ring", 1)
move("Hero", 3, 1)  # Gearcrafting Station
craft("Hero", "strangold_armor", 1)
craft("Hero", "ancient_jean", 1)
craft("Hero", "gold_boots", 1)

# Equip the crafted gear
unequip("Hero", "body_armor")
equip("Hero", "body_armor", "strangold_armor", 1)
unequip("Hero", "leg_armor")
equip("Hero", "leg_armor", "ancient_jean", 1)
unequip("Hero", "boots")
equip("Hero", "boots", "gold_boots", 1)
unequip("Hero", "ring1")
equip("Hero", "ring1", "topaz_ring", 1)

# Move to and defeat Cultist Emperor
move("Hero", -2, 13)
fight("Hero")
